summary: Iteration 6 UX-polish verified end-to-end at 1920x1080. Footer reduced to X + email only (LinkedIn/Instagram testids removed). Cursor-following preview tooltip now small (w-44) with translateX/Y 32px offset to bottom-right of cursor in BOTH Services (aspect 4/5) and Work (aspect 4/3) — measured offsetRight=32, offsetDown=32-33 — title text remains visible & not occluded. All regressions intact: custom cursor (DISCOVER/VIEW labels), magnetic CTAs, services+work dim hover, contact form e2e -> 201 + 'Resend sent id=' fired. Backend pytest 7/7. 0 console errors.

verified_checks.backend_pytest: 7/7 PASSED — health, lead create (+phone+message), required-only, invalid email 422, missing name 422, missing email 422, list-leads sorted desc + no _id + phone present
verified_checks.footer_socials: footer-x present (text='@BLAYAKE ON X', href=https://x.com/blayake), footer-email present (href=mailto:teamblayake.agency@gmail.com); footer-linkedin and footer-instagram REMOVED (querySelector returns null)
verified_checks.services_preview_offset: service-row-03 hover -> preview rect=(600,725) w=176 h=220, cursor=(568,692) -> offsetRight=32px offsetDown=32px (matches translateX:32px translateY:32px). className contains 'w-44 aspect-[4/5]'. Row title 'Short-Form Content' remains in DOM and visible during hover.
verified_checks.work_preview_offset: work-row-1 hover -> preview rect=(600,509) w=176 h=132, cursor=(568,476) -> offsetRight=32px offsetDown=33px. className contains 'w-44 aspect-[4/3]'. Row title 'AI support deflected 62% of tickets' remains visible.
verified_checks.cursor_regression: cursor-dot + cursor-ring present, ring label='DISCOVER' on service-row hover (custom cursor view-mode works)
verified_checks.contact_form_e2e: TEST_iter6_user submitted -> form-status='GOT IT. WE\'LL BE IN TOUCH WITHIN 24 HOURS.' Backend log: 'Resend sent id=d1ca8d05-c0cb-48b8-8938-263f6b819754 to=[teamblayake.agency@gmail.com]' confirms email background task fired. Auto-reply correctly skipped (AUTOREPLY_ENABLED=false).

critical_code_review_comments: PreviewCard/WorkPreview style uses BOTH framer x/y motion values AND translateX/Y:'32px' — framer concatenates these into transform: 'translateX(199px) translateY(312px) translateX(32px) translateY(32px)'. This works (last translateX overrides — actually both are applied additively, giving the desired spring + 32px offset). Acceptable, but slightly fragile if framer changes serialization; could be cleaner to add 32 inside onMove (mx.set(e.clientX-rect.left+32)).
Resend integration verified live. RESEND_API_KEY in /app/backend/.env, AUTOREPLY_ENABLED=false (Resend test-mode constraint, expected per request).
All 39 data-testids preserved (footer-linkedin/-instagram removed by design; net 41 -> 39).
seed_data_creation: Created lead TEST_Iter6_User / TEST_iter6@example.com via UI form submission for Resend live verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview offset measurement: hover service/work row, then in JS read preview.getBoundingClientRect() vs cursor coords -> offsetRight & offsetDown should both equal 32 (within 1-2px due to spring). Preview transform string contains FOUR translates (spring x, spring y, +32 x, +32 y) which is intentional. Resend log marker: 'Resend sent id=' in /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log after each /api/leads POST. AUTOREPLY_ENABLED=false is expected (Resend test mode).
